text:
The new-generation Yacht-Master II. Available in Oystersteel or in 18ct yellow gold, the new version of this unique regatta chronograph presents a completely revisited design and movement. The programmable countdown function of this nautical watch – featuring a mechanical memory and on-the-fly synchronization – has been entirely redesigned to more effectively assist sailors during the critical start sequence of races.
#Rolex #YachtMasterII #WatchesAndWonders2026
For more details, see link in profile.

Rolex unveils the Datejust 41 in a white Rolesor version adorned with a green lacquer ombré dial, uniting some of the brand’s most distinguishing features: a fluted bezel, an elegant green hue, robust steel and precious white gold.
#Rolex #Datejust #WatchesAndWonders2026

Playful and precious, the 18ct gold versions of the Oyster Perpetual 28 and Oyster Perpetual 34 are notably offered in variants with lacquer dials on which three of the hour markers – those at 3, 6 and 9 o’clock – are in natural stone.
#Rolex #OysterPerpetual #WatchesAndWonders2026

An explosion of colours. Masterful technique. A flourishing legacy. The new Oyster Perpetual 36 boasts a multicoloured lacquer dial decorated with a revisited Jubilee motif. The letters of the Rolex name form a joyful and sophisticated composition, the result of a veritable technical achievement.
#Rolex #OysterPerpetual #WatchesAndWonders2026

A celebration of the birth of the Oyster, the new Oyster Perpetual 41 in a yellow Rolesor version – a first for the range. In honour of its heritage, the winding crown features the number 100 in relief and the inscription ‘100 years’ appears at 6 o’clock on its slate dial.
#Rolex #OysterPerpetual #WatchesAndWonders2026

Precise, robust and unwaveringly reliable, the Oyster has accompanied explorers and pioneers across sea, land and sky – enduring the elements and rising to every challenge. A watch shaped by 100 years of innovation, and defined by those who wear it.
#Rolex #OysterStory

Crowning the essential. Materials science, dial-making artistry and pure performance. This year’s new watches set new benchmarks in technical excellence, shaping the future of watchmaking. A new world begins.
#Rolex #WatchesAndWonders2026

Where a new century begins. Unveiling 14 April 2026.
#Rolex #WatchesAndWonders2026

From a single idea to a century of innovation. Discover Oyster Story on 14 April 2026.
#Rolex #OysterStory

This is @themasters. Where legend is written and the winner adorned with the Green Jacket. To win at Augusta National Golf Club, on a course steeped in history and tradition, is career-defining. This is where golfing greatness endures.
REACH FOR THE CROWN.
#Rolex #TheMasters #Reachforthecrown

The GMT-Master II. The reference across all meridians. With a second time zone displayed by a dedicated hand. Bidirectional rotatable 24-hour graduated bezel with Cerachrom insert in grey and black ceramic. Five-piece link Jubilee bracelet, comfortable, supple and tough. In 18ct yellow gold cast in our own foundry. 40mm, calibre 3285.
#Rolex #GMTMasterII #101031
